name: image-prompt-architect
description: Reusable Codex skill for designing, adapting, critiquing, and iterating AI image-generation prompts.

interface.shortDescription: Build structured prompts for AI images.
interface.longDescription: Image Prompt Architect packages a reusable prompt-design workflow for AI image generation. It supports seven-layer prompts, multi-system modular templates, model-specific adapters, prompt critique, and iteration checklists.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Image Prompt Architect to turn my image idea into a structured, model-adapted prompt.
